message:
chore: suppress missing_docs warnings on dual-run record types; re-export subject types

- dual_run.rs: Add #[allow(missing_docs)] to seven public struct/enum
  types (CancelTerminalPhase, TerminalOutcome, CancellationRecord,
  LoserDrainRecord, RegionCloseRecord, ObligationBalanceRecord,
  ResourceSurfaceRecord) whose fields are self-documenting and used
  primarily as serialization records. Avoids noisy warnings while the
  FABRIC API stabilizes.

- messaging/mod.rs: Re-export subject module public types (Subject,
  SubjectPattern, SubjectPatternError, SubjectToken, Sublist,
  SublistResult, SubscriptionGuard, SubscriptionId) gated behind
  messaging-fabric feature for downstream consumer convenience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
